name: Thornwall
description: A settlement built into the side of a mountain, where the forges never cool. The walls are iron-reinforced stone — not for beauty, but because the mountain shakes sometimes and anything less would crumble. Smoke rises from a dozen chimneys at all hours. The sound of hammers is the town's heartbeat.
atmosphere: Iron smoke, cold wind, the rhythmic ring of hammers, orange forge-light spilling from doorways at night, the mountain humming beneath your feet
